calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-439 Factor-B-alone (gap-scaled commit-T) isolation retest
items.note: Factor-B-alone (gap-scaled commit-T, ARM_A0B1) isolation retest the V3-EXQ-689a decomposition pointed at. Re-points the pre-registered PRIMARY from A1B1 (both levers, FAILED) to A0B1 (Factor B alone, the only converter: 0.850, beat its flat-hot control + proposer 2/3 seeds, resisted seed-43 collapse). 6 arms (PROPOSER_CTRL/MATCHED_NOISE/A0B0-topk/A0B1-PRIMARY/A1B1-confirmatory[A poisons B]/FIXED_HOT_T-flat-control); dropped the Factor-A-only arms (A1B0, FIXED_KMAX). LOAD-BEARING C_GAPBLIND_B = A0B1 strict-above FIXED_HOT_T (gap-scaling beats flat-hot); C_PRIMARY = A0B1 strict-above both collapsed controls; readiness route_range + e2-pairwise + t_eff-VARIES (NOT k_varies, Factor A off). NO supersedes (689a's combined-conflict-grade verdict stands; this isolates a sub-lever). Pinned ree-cloud-3 (cloud, not the Mac) per the duration/affinity lesson. Gating input for the MECH-442 decide-to-build packet Section 6.

items.title: SD-049-PHASE-2 MECH-436 drive-coupling MEASUREMENT REDESIGN: continuous incentive-amplitude readout at moderate kappa (6.0); supersedes V3-EXQ-514t
items.note: MEASUREMENT-REDESIGN retest of the SD-049-PHASE-2 drive-coupling leg (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514t_2026-06-20 confirmed/user-adjudicated; the deferred fork failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514s Section 7 pre-registered IF the kappa amend stalls -- it has). 514t (supersedes) showed the kappa-magnitude lever is EXHAUSTED as a monotone repair: doubling incentive_drive_kappa_scale 6.0->12.0 REGRESSED the natural flip-gated WL delta (514s +0.064/sd0.109/2-of-5-clear -> 514t -0.037/sd0.188/1-of-5-clear, 2 seeds strongly negative); at kappa_eff=24 drive over-amplifies base_value so most_wanted->argmax(per_axis_drive), destabilising the argmax through a near-tie landscape the argmax-flip-gated metric reads as sign-unstable noise. THE REDESIGN: add a CONTINUOUS incentive-amplitude readout (the normalized-wanting re-weighting toward the most-depleted axis under natural per-axis drive vs the uniform-drive baseline: share_natural[k_dep]-share_uniform[k_dep] in (-1,1), sub-flip, robust to argmax noise) ALONGSIDE the existing flip-gated delta (kept secondary). The continuous metric is the LOAD-BEARING supports gate. kappa REVERTED 12.0->6.0 (the 514s bimodal-positive point; kappa_eff=12, <= the C8 bounded-kappa upper bound that 12.0/kappa_eff=24 violated); DO NOT raise kappa again -- FALSIFIED as a monotone repair. per_axis_restoration_fraction stays 0.15 (lever b done; enriched_spread ~0.19 met on all 514t seeds; not deepened). KEPT controls: overshoot positive control (flip mag 5.0; the genuine-weakens off-ramp), OFF/bank-disabled floor (flip + continuous, hard zero), recalibrated argmax-relevance readiness, enriched-spread gate, contact guard. Effect-size gate on the continuous metric: max(CONT_K_SD*pstdev(per_seed_shift), CONT_FLOOR=0.05) on SD-of-DELTA + absolute floor -- NEVER pstdev(baseline_level). Pre-registered promotion target: continuous drive-coupled amplitude shift toward the depleted axis >= the effect-size floor on >=2/3 seeds -> MECH-436 substrate_ceiling -> supports. The five+1 non-vacuity preconditions self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens); a preconditions-met continuous-below-margin FAIL with overshoot still flipping is substrate_ceiling (NOT a falsification); only overshoot-cannot-flip is a genuine weakens. MECH-436 stays candidate/substrate_ceiling/pending_retest_after_substrate (NOT promoted; governance applies). PROTECT MECH-229 leg (a) wanting!=liking (V3-EXQ-514o PASS 0.80) -- NOT under test, must not be weakened (the hard-zero OFF floor confirms drive is not manufacturing a comparator artifact). Dry-run smoke PASS: runs end-to-end through the full 603n curriculum; all 6 readiness gates fire; continuous metric cont_shift=+0.138 (supports) DIVERGES from the flip delta -0.182 (the redesign's point -- sub-flip re-weighting the argmax-gate read as noise); continuous OFF floor structurally hard-zero (0.00e+00); overshoot positive control flips 1.0; enriched_spread met. NOTE (audit trail): queued under concurrent experiment_queue.json writers; working-tree-vs-HEAD audit (WT==HEAD) + post-commit dropped-file check applied per queue-experiment Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race).

items.title: SD-049 Phase-2 4-arm substrate-gradient validation: measurement re-issue of V3-EXQ-693 porting the working 514t info-tag WL-scoring harness so the R3 non-vacuity guard fires; supersedes V3-EXQ-693
items.note: failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-693_2026-06-20 (confirmed): 693 self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue/non_vacuity_unmet with R3 (WL-channel-fireable) the sole unmet guard (n_scored_wl_steps_total=0 all 4 arms/3 seeds) = INSTRUMENTATION gap (693 forked from 514l pre-514n; stale WL-scoring harness), NOT a substrate ceiling/falsification. 693a ports the 514t info-tag WL read (liking target + L2 bind from info['sd049_consumed_type_tag_this_tick'] captured pre-clear; WL scoring gated on a genuine consumption event); 4-arm gradient + identity probe + ANOVA + R1/R2/R3 self-route guards unchanged; R1 contact counter keeps benefit-OR-consumed gate so ARM_0 (SD-049 OFF) not regressed. Dry-run smoke: WL scored 9 (693=0), probe 0.733/n=347, ANOVA 55.3, pc_sep 1.0. WATCH (carried from autopsy S5, gated behind R3 in 693): C_GR margin lift was near-zero (ARM_2-ARM_0=0.0067; -0.0087 ARM_3) -> a margin-near-zero outcome post-WL-fix is a likely conversion-side substrate_ceiling/substrate_conditional re-route (via /failure-autopsy), NOT a falsification.
